user_query: I want to know the daily dividend data for the stock symbol AAPL from March 2, 2022, to March 3, 2022, and fetch the historical price data and stock profile data.

TaskList.description: Fetch daily dividend data for the stock symbol AAPL from March 2, 2022, to March 3, 2022.
Fetch historical price data for the stock symbol AAPL.
Fetch stock profile data for the stock symbol AAPL.
